core_mechanism: A trace-formula-type spectral asymptotic that links a smoothed sum over the eigenvalues of a self-adjoint operator to the periodic (closed/looping) trajectories of the associated flow, in which the correction to the leading-order asymptotic count is controlled by the measure of the set of periodic 'looping' times (vanishing when that set has measure zero).
brief_reason: The abstract refines a Kuznetsov-type asymptotic for a counting function attached to Laplace-Beltrami eigenvalues, with the improvement hinging on the set of looping times having measure zero, which is exactly the spectrum-versus-periodic-orbit trace-formula machinery whose remainder is governed by the measure of the periodic set.
